Quarterly Business Review — Q1 2025

Executive Summary

Revenue for Q1 2025 reached $12.7 million, representing a 15% increase
over the same period last year. The growth was primarily driven by strong
performance in the North and East regions, which together accounted for
62% of total revenue.

Key Highlights

The Widget A product line remained the top seller with 570 units shipped
across all regions. Widget C, despite lower volume, generated the highest
per-unit revenue at $22.00. The South region showed consistent demand
across all three product categories.

Customer acquisition cost decreased by 8% quarter-over-quarter, while
customer retention improved to 94.2%. The sales team expanded by three
new hires in February, contributing to the March revenue spike.

Outlook

Management expects Q2 revenue to grow by an additional 10-12%, supported
by the upcoming Widget D launch scheduled for June 2025. Supply chain
constraints in the East region have been resolved as of late March.
